ddls:
CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "forename" TEXT /* Forename of the individual */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Surname of the individual */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the individual */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the individual */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation of the individual */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address of the individual */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "occupation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_occupation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_type_id") REFERENCES occupation_types ("occupation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address_name" TEXT /* Name of the address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupation_types" (
  "occupation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation type */,
  "occupation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the researcher belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "census_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census data being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the census data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the census data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_census_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_data_id") REFERENCES census_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "census_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census data being versioned */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the census data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_versions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_versions_census_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_data_id") REFERENCES census_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_teams" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id", "team_id")
)
